name: Luminous Spark Extractor
oracle_text: When ~ enters, target opponent discards a card. If that card was a creature card, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.
flavor_text:
"We don't kill slavers. We simply... repurpose them."
--Kessa, Spark operative

validation_errors: Non-creature card has power and/or toughness set
Card has power/toughness but 'Creature' is not in card_types

design_notes: Black uncommon at CMC 3. A 2/2 for 3 with a discard ETB is a solid but fair uncommon -- compare Burglar Rat (common, weaker) and Raider's Wake (uncommon, stronger). The conditional token creation adds value without being too complex. The Construct token ties into the set's super-science theme and the Society of the Luminous Spark's brain-extraction lore. P+T=4 <= 3+3=6, well within budget. Discard is core black, token creation is secondary.
